en: The word of the LORD came to me:
zh: 耶和華的話又臨到我說：

en: "Son of man, prophesy, and say, Thus says the Lord GOD: "Wail, 'Alas for the day!'
zh: “人子啊！你要說預言：‘主耶和華這樣說： 你們要哀號：那一天有禍了！

en: For the day is near, the day of the LORD is near; it will be a day of clouds, a time of doom for the nations.
zh: 因為那一天臨近了， 耶和華的日子臨近了， 就是密雲的日子， 列國受罰的時候。

en: A sword shall come upon Egypt, and anguish shall be in Cush, when the slain fall in Egypt, and her wealth is carried away, and her foundations are torn down.
zh: 必有刀劍臨到埃及， 被殺的人倒在埃及的時候， 在古實就有痛苦； 埃及的財富必被奪去， 它的根基必被拆毀。

en: Cush, and Put, and Lud, and all Arabia, and Libya, and the people of the land that is in league, shall fall with them by the sword.
zh: 古實人、弗人、路德人、所有外族的人、呂彼亞 人，以及與埃及結盟的人，都必與埃及人一起倒在刀下。

en: "Thus says the LORD: Those who support Egypt shall fall, and her proud might shall come down; from Migdol to Syene they shall fall within her by the sword, declares the Lord GOD.
zh: “‘耶和華這樣說： 那些支持埃及的必傾倒， 埃及所誇耀的勢力必衰落。 從密奪到色弗尼， 他們都必倒在刀下； 這是主耶和華說的：

en: And they shall be desolated in the midst of desolated countries, and their cities shall be in the midst of cities that are laid waste.
zh: 埃及必成為荒地中的荒地， 它的城必成為廢城中的廢城。

en: Then they will know that I am the LORD, when I have set fire to Egypt, and all her helpers are broken.
zh: 我在埃及點起火來的時候， 所有幫助埃及的都必滅亡； 那時他們就知道我是耶和華。

en: "On that day messengers shall go out from me in ships to terrify the unsuspecting people of Cush, and anguish shall come upon them on the day of Egypt's doom; for, behold, it comes!
zh: 那一天，必有使者從我面前乘船出去，使安逸無慮的古實人驚慌；在埃及遭難的日子，必有痛苦臨到他們。看哪！這事來到了！

en: "Thus says the Lord GOD: "I will put an end to the wealth of Egypt, by the hand of Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon.
zh: 主耶和華這樣說： “‘我必藉著巴比倫王尼布甲尼撒的手， 消滅埃及的財富。

en: He and his people with him, the most ruthless of nations, shall be brought in to destroy the land, and they shall draw their swords against Egypt and fill the land with the slain.
zh: 他和跟隨他的人， 就是列國中最強橫的人， 必被領進來，毀滅這地； 他們必拔出刀來攻擊埃及， 使遍地滿了被殺的人。

en: And I will dry up the Nile and will sell the land into the hand of evildoers; I will bring desolation upon the land and everything in it, by the hand of foreigners; I am the LORD; I have spoken.
zh: 我必使江河乾涸， 把這地賣給惡人； 我必藉著外族人的手， 使這地和其中所充滿的，都變成荒涼。 我耶和華已經說了。

en: "Thus says the Lord GOD: "I will destroy the idols and put an end to the images in Memphis; there shall no longer be a prince from the land of Egypt; so I will put fear in the land of Egypt.
zh: 主耶和華這樣說： “‘我必毀滅偶像， 使虛無的神像從挪弗滅絕。 必不再有君王從埃及地而出； 我也必使懼怕臨到埃及地。

en: I will make Pathros a desolation and will set fire to Zoan and will execute judgments on Thebes.
zh: 我必使巴忒羅荒涼， 也必在瑣安點起火來， 又向挪施行審判。

en: And I will pour out my wrath on Pelusium, the stronghold of Egypt, and cut off the multitude of Thebes.
zh: 我必把我的烈怒倒在訓上， 就是埃及的保障， 並要剪除挪的眾民。

en: And I will set fire to Egypt; Pelusium shall be in great agony; Thebes shall be breached, and Memphis shall face enemies by day.
zh: 我必在埃及點起火來； 訓必有大痛苦； 挪必被攻破； 挪弗必終日受難。

en: The young men of On and of Pibeseth shall fall by the sword, and the women shall go into captivity.
zh: 亞文和比伯實的年輕人 都必倒在刀下； 這些城的人必被擄去。

en: At Tehaphnehes the day shall be dark, when I break there the yoke bars of Egypt, and her proud might shall come to an end in her; she shall be covered by a cloud, and her daughters shall go into captivity.
zh: 我在答比匿折斷埃及眾軛的時候， 白晝就必變為黑暗； 埃及所誇耀的勢力必在其中止息； 這城必有密雲遮蓋， 城中的居民必被擄去。

en: Thus I will execute judgments on Egypt. Then they will know that I am the LORD."
zh: 我必這樣向埃及施行審判， 他們就知道我是耶和華。’”

en: In the eleventh year, in the first month, on the seventh day of the month, the word of the LORD came to me:
zh: 十一年正月初七日，耶和華的話臨到我說：

en: "Son of man, I have broken the arm of Pharaoh king of Egypt, and behold, it has not been bound up, to heal it by binding it with a bandage, so that it may become strong to wield the sword.
zh: “人子啊！我折斷了埃及王法老的膀臂；看哪！沒有人把它包紮治療，沒有人用繃帶把它纏裹，好讓它有力量拿起刀來。

en: Therefore thus says the Lord GOD: Behold, I am against Pharaoh king of Egypt and will break his arms, both the strong arm and the one that was broken, and I will make the sword fall from his hand.
zh: 因此，主耶和華這樣說：‘看哪！我與埃及王法老為敵；我必打斷他有力的膀臂，和已經折了的膀臂，使刀從他的手中掉下。

en: I will scatter the Egyptians among the nations and disperse them through the countries.
zh: 我必把埃及人分散到列邦，四散在各地。

en: And I will strengthen the arms of the king of Babylon and put my sword in his hand, but I will break the arms of Pharaoh, and he will groan before him like a man mortally wounded.
zh: “‘我必使巴比倫王的膀臂有力量，把我的刀交在他手中；我要折斷法老的膀臂，使他在巴比倫王面前呻吟，像一個受傷快死的人一樣。

en: I will strengthen the arms of the king of Babylon, but the arms of Pharaoh shall fall. Then they shall know that I am the LORD, when I put my sword into the hand of the king of Babylon and he stretches it out against the land of Egypt.
zh: 我必使巴比倫王的膀臂有力量，法老的膀臂卻要下垂。我把我的刀交在巴比倫王手裡，使他舉刀攻擊埃及地的時候，他們就知道我是耶和華。

en: And I will scatter the Egyptians among the nations and disperse them throughout the countries. Then they will know that I am the LORD."
zh: 我必把埃及人分散到列邦，四散在各地；他們就知道我是耶和華。’”
